input: Run newsletter design on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected newsletter design output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the newsletter design workflow

input: Apply newsletter design to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive newsletter design analysis with evidence-tagged findings

expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to newsletter design
